race.description: Gazebo & Shade Centre Country Boosted Hcp (C1)
race.comment: SNEAKY PEE CEE (4) comes here deep into the campaign and is set to find winning form fifth-up. Drifted back from the inside gate and outclassed when eighth over 1000m at Gosford in Highway class. Can get the better of these today. DEE DEE EXPRESS (2) resumes from a lengthy break. Jumped in trip from the wide gate with a fading last over 1400m at Rosehill in Highway class last November. Proven over the trip and shapes as the main danger from the low draw. JENNI DIVINE (8) just over six weeks between runs when she knocked up late to run seventh over 1200m at Goulburn. Fitter now from the good gate and stays in the mix. I SHOW SPEED (1) lightly raced gelding returning from a lengthy break. Won well on debut, then disappointed as fav with a tiring seventh over 1280m at Canberra Acton last July. Back with the one trial placing over 900m on the Acton track. Can go on with it this time in.
